steps.title: Set up unit conversion
steps.content: Since 1 yard equals 36 inches, to convert 612 inches to yards, we divide by the conversion factor: $$\frac{612}{36}$$.

steps.title: Evaluate the division
steps.content: $$\frac{612}{36} = 17$$. Therefore, 612 inches is equivalent to 17 yards. That matches choice B — B is correct.
